target: You two were... trying to save Shiori-chan together...
It's not just my memories... My power has returned, too...
I want you to see my final moments... The truth...
I'm going to try to replay the past... from the data of Ushio Kofune's memories...!!
Both of you, hold my hands.
Let's go! To the private beach on July 21st...!!
It's the perfect weather to study...
It's perfect weather for swimming!! Don't open your notebook!!
You still can't swim yet, huh!? Lame~~~, even Akari can swim and she's younger than you!!
Hah!! Even you can't eat shiitake mushrooms, <color=#GF_TIPS_024>Hamaji</color>!!
Not being able to eat shiitake mushrooms isn't lame, so it's okay!!
No mistake... It's us... on the 21st...!!
O-Oh no, I have to stop them!!
It's pointless. This is an "image" of the past... We're just watching a recording.
We can't touch them or talk to them... Right, Ushio?
Ushio, where are you right now?
This way, I'm pretty sure it was around there...
Looking at it like this... I really have gotten a little chubby around the stomach...
Jeez! Stop it!! I'm self-conscious about it...!!
So this is where you copied the swimsuit.
...But if we stay like this, only one of us can stay near Shiori-chan, right?
I've got a good idea! Can you turn into this necklace?
Ah, I see...! Yeah, I'll give it a try!
I turned into a necklace like that, and had Ushio wear me.
Unlike humans, the data size for "objects" is small, so even if I overwrote myself a little bit, I wouldn't lose my sense of self.
We took off the real necklace and put it away in the pool bag.
After that, we met up with everyone and made sure to stay close to Shiori-chan.
So far, there doesn't seem to be anything unusual.
She says Akari peed her pants...
No I didn't!! It's coming out right now~~~~~!!
Oh, so it hasn't come out yet!
Want Sis to take you to the bathroom!?
Then I'm counting on you, be careful.
At this time, for just a moment... Just a single moment... We took our eyes off Shiori-chan...
Shinpei...!! Did you see it!? What happened to Shiori-chan...!!
Wh... When I noticed... she was gone... leaving only her floatie behind...!!
Sorry... this is a "memory"... I can't recreate places no one saw...
(...That's right! I need to keep a close eye on Shiori-chan...!)
(Where is she right now? She hasn't strayed far from Ushio, right...)
(Wh-What the...!? I can't see anything behind her...!?)
At this time, for just a moment... Just a single moment... We took our eyes off Shiori-chan...
Shinpei!! Did you see it!? What happened to Shiori-chan...!!
No... my vision went weird... By the time I could see, she was gone... leaving only her floatie behind...!!
Sorry... this is a "memory"... I can't recreate places no one saw...
Ushio! In the sea!! I can sense a Shadow!!!
Mio, Sou! Leave this to me!! Take care of Akari-chan!
(Shiori-chan... Hold on, I'm coming to save you...!!)
Alright, here we go... undo the transformation!!
Shiori-chan!! I'll take you up right now...!!
Hey, look, the Shadow is...!! It's turning into mush!
In the sea, the Shadow's main body is countless pieces of garbage drifting in the water. They stick to the surface of plankton particles and sway around the 3D body...
Even if you try to slice it, it's dispersed into particles, so it moves with the water and can't be caught. It was impossible to defeat it here.
So our top priority wasn't defeating the Shadow, but saving Shiori-chan's life...!!
At that time, Shiori-chan wasn't breathing. I just hurried to the surface...
What was that voice just now!? Where did it... Ah!?
A part of the Shadow I cut away...! It was still attached to Shiori-chan's leg!!
I chose her. Don't take her.
I got tangled up by that thing, and it was like sleep paralysis... I became completely unable to move.
Shadows can't move if their 3D form is grabbed... At this time, I still hadn't realized that...
Guh... Idiot!! What are you spacing out for!!!!
A defective product... Most likely a degraded stray.
I will initialize that personality and memories, and return you to normal.
...S-Stop... it...!! My... memories... don't erase them...!
Tch. Sou and Mio are... getting closer...
I guess I can't erase everything... Lucky girl...
...From here on out, it's just as Sou knows...
...You said... we were even...! How am I supposed to... repay a debt like this...
I will...!! Defeat the Shadows together with Shinpei...!!
I'll save everyone... from the summer festival on the 24th...!!!
And then... I wonder if I can... repay my debt... even just a little bit!
Yeah... you can repay it!!! You can...!!!!
...The footage ends here. That's everything that happened that day...
It pretended to faint and had Mio help it... so that thing successfully swapped places with Shiori-chan...
Unforgivable... I want to kill it with my own two hands right now...!
(That thing... I already killed Shadow Shiori at Koba Mart... But—)

developer_comments: 少女の声（シオリ（ハイネ））

target: I... I just heard a voice...
The footage has been stopped for a while now! We're the only ones who can talk in this space...!
H-Hey Ushio... This is a video, right!? You said we couldn't touch or talk to them...!!
That's impossible!!! I don't have this memory!!
Something's wrong... End the video already, Ushio!!
Send us back!! Take us back to the original reality!
I've been looking for you for quite a while since then.
